result.summary: Found 3 issues: navigation text truncation, game title text overflow, and incomplete carousel content display.

issues.description: Navigation tab text 'Hot Gar' is truncated and should read 'Hot Games' or similar - text is being cut off at the edge
issues.suggestion: Adjust container width or use text truncation with ellipsis, or reduce font size to allow full text visibility in navigation tabs

issues.description: Multiple game titles in the exclusive games section are truncated: 'MAGNIFI PHON' (should be complete title), 'MUNC' and 'MMM' are clearly cut off, indicating overflow issues
issues.suggestion: Ensure game title containers have proper overflow handling - use text-overflow: ellipsis, or increase container height/width to accommodate full text

issues.description: Game tiles on the right edge of carousel sections are partially cut off - content is being clipped by container boundaries
issues.suggestion: Adjust carousel padding/margins or ensure proper overflow settings to prevent game tiles from being cut off at edges
